# Dennis Jonathan's Portfolio

> AI enthusiast and problem solver with a background in math, stats, and machine learning. I build practical tools, explore weird ideas, and make complex stuff a little more approachable.

- **Build version:** v2026.06.03

Hey, I'm Dennis. I like taking ideas apart, figuring out how they tick, and putting them back together in a way that feels a little smarter. I studied Business Mathematics, but these days my curiosity leans more toward data, AI, and building systems that make life flow a bit smoother. I like when logic meets intuition, when something just clicks and works better than it has any right to.

I've built and shipped ML apps, orchestrated chatbots, and pieced together tools that turn chaos into clarity. I'm drawn to projects that live in the messy space between idea and execution, where a rough sketch becomes something people actually use. I care less about chasing hype and more about quiet, useful progress: automations that save time, systems that scale well, and ideas that grow legs on their own.

Outside of work, I'm usually buried in ML papers I only half understand (for now), sketching side projects that may or may not see daylight, or running laps in a sim rig like there's a trophy at stake. I love comics, science books, and strange ideas that don't fit anywhere yet. For me, building isn't just about utility, it's about curiosity, rhythm, and play.

## Work Experience

### AI/ML Engineer at Sinar Mas Land (February 2024 - Now)

- Spearheaded optimization of OCR pipelines and developed self-service AI platform, achieving high-accuracy document processing for 2,000+ daily requests.
- Engineered a robust enterprise agentic chatbot utilizing LangChain and OpenAI, effectively streamlining internal communications across diverse departments. It uses RAG and ReAct to provide accurate and up-to-date information to employees.
- Built a scalable WhatsApp call analysis system that automatically evaluates and grades customer service agent performance across ~1,000 customer interactions per month. The solution streamlines quality assurance by analyzing conversations for service quality, consistency, and compliance, enabling faster feedback loops, performance benchmarking, and improved customer support operations.

### AI/ML Developer Intern at Sinar Mas Land (November 2023 - January 2024)

- Actively contributed to the maintenance and advancement of the company's proprietary machine learning pipelines, with a primary focus on OCR systems for document information detection and extraction.
- Collaborated in the creation of novel OCR pipelines specifically designed for Vehicle Registration Number (VRN) detection and extraction.

### Business Intelligence Intern at Vidio.com (August - December 2022)

- Played a key role in generating actionable insights and fostering a deeper understanding of platform user behaviors and product analytics through SQL and advanced visualization tools.
- Conducted in-depth research on user funneling progression, customer retention strategies, and cancellation patterns.

### Marketing Research Intern at Universitas Prasetiya Mulya (January - February 2020)

- Assisted in identifying and evaluating potential strategic partners for the successful launch of Universitas Prasetiya Mulya's Master's program in Business Analytics.
- Performed comprehensive competitor research to pinpoint opportunities for enhancing and optimizing marketing initiatives.

### Bachelor of Mathematics at Universitas Prasetiya Mulya (August 2019 - August 2023)

- Graduated with a distinguished GPA of 3.88.
- Authored a thesis on "Predictive Modelling of Changes in GOTO Stock Prices using Historical and Exogenous Data with LSTM and SARIMAX".
- Honored as a beneficiary of the prestigious Young Scholar Indonesia Scholarship.

## Projects

### Reality Check
Animating Financial Delusion
**Links:**
- Give it a try: https://reality-check-tawny.vercel.app/?q=IDRUSD%3DX&speed=5&type=line&interval=1d
- Github: https://github.com/dennisjooo/reality-check
- Portfolio: https://dennisjooo.vercel.app/blogs/reality-check-animating-financial-delusion

---

### A Journey In Losing Money
Lessons I had from trying to make my own trading-bot

### Act Natural
Teaching AI to act human? Spoiler alert: it's beautifully chaotic.
**Links:**
- Github: https://github.com/dennisjooo/act-natural
- Portfolio: https://dennisjooo.vercel.app/blogs/act-natural

---

### What is that Bird we're looking at?
Ever wondered what bird you're looking at? This classifier has over 90k downloads on HuggingFace's model hub.
**Links:**
- Github: https://github.com/dennisjooo/Birds-Classifier-EfficientNetB2
- HuggingFace: https://huggingface.co/dennisjooo/Birds-Classifier-EfficientNetB2
- Portfolio: https://dennisjooo.vercel.app/blogs/what-is-that-bird-we-re-looking-at

---

### Teaching Transformers to Write Harry Potter
What happens when you teach AI to write like J.K. Rowling? Pure magic (or at least entertaining gibberish).
**Links:**
- Github: https://github.com/dennisjooo/Character-Generation-on-Wizardry-Books
- Portfolio: https://dennisjooo.vercel.app/blogs/teaching-transformers-to-write-harry-potter

---

### Forging Handwritten Digits
Teaching machines to forge handwritten digits so convincingly, even other machines can't tell the difference.
**Links:**
- Github: https://github.com/dennisjooo/DCGAN-on-MNIST
- Portfolio: https://dennisjooo.vercel.app/blogs/forging-handwritten-digits

---

### Finding Anomalies using Things We Already Know
Hunting down financial criminals with machine learning. AutoEncoders won this round with 93% accuracy.
**Links:**
- Github: https://github.com/dennisjooo/Credit-Fraud-Detector
- Portfolio: https://dennisjooo.vercel.app/blogs/finding-anomalies-using-things-we-already-know

---

### Can Twitter Predict the Stock Market?
Can Twitter sentiment predict stock prices? Turns out LSTM + social media data beats traditional models.
- Portfolio: https://dennisjooo.vercel.app/blogs/can-twitter-predict-the-stock-market

---

### Will They Make All-NBA?
Can machine learning predict basketball greatness? Training models to forecast All-NBA team selections.
**Links:**
- Github: https://github.com/dennisjooo/All-NBA-Predictor
- Deck: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/190z_733eXOQEWJ3sTLA6T_b8lYXbDoYpxGR7XV6soXk/edit?usp=sharing
- Paper: https://github.com/dennisjooo/All-NBA-Predictor/blob/master/Result.pdf
- Portfolio: https://dennisjooo.vercel.app/blogs/will-they-make-all-nba

## Skills & Technologies

- **Languages:** Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, C++, HTML5
- **AI & Machine Learning:** PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, HuggingFace, LangChain, OpenCV, Pandas, Lightning, Keras, OpenAI
- **Web & Frameworks:** React, Next.js, FastAPI, Flask, TailwindCSS, Streamlit, ShadcnUI
- **Backend & Tools:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, Git, GitHub, Upstash

## Certifications

- **Mastering AI Bootcamp** - Ruangguru Engineering Academy (2023): A 2-month bootcamp covering practical Machine Learning and deployment using Fast.API and Gradio. — https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1ZhPL2rmv7qES_NUtJy53kmB0AfFgfdQS?usp=sharing
- **DataCamp Courses** - DataCamp (2023): Completed courses on Big Data with PySpark, Deep Learning with Python, and Applied Finance in Python. — https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Z0oWPLLrxiswjgU1D2YLkz4_8Bup5uU2/view?usp=sharing
- **Deep Learning Specialization** - DeepLearning.AI (2022): Comprehensive course on Neural Networks and their architectures. — https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1dR0Id6HJRQvMP2OZdYzTBjJwgvfRIuFw?usp=sharing
- **DataQuest Tracks** - DataQuest (2021): Completed tracks: Data Scientist in Python, Data Engineer in Python, and Data Analyst in R. — https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1iQiY_0XJAm0dwE9q-IYNedT-ZDhaTWCJ?usp=sharing
- **Python for Everybody** - Coursera (2020): First online course series, covering Python basics, Web APIs, and web scraping. — https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1gpnY9sZo-KbcK-G-oA4yG1eLQzRVoqnv?usp=sharing
